Alvin and the Chipmunks: The Road Chip (2015)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $85,886,987Details
International Box Office $163,630,969
Worldwide Box Office $249,517,956
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $11,023,082
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $5,988,774
Total $17,011,856
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Through a series of misunderstandings, Alvin, Simon and Theodore come to believe that Dave is going to propose to his new girlfriend in New York City…and dump them. They have three days to get to him and stop the proposal, saving themselves not only from losing Dave but possibly from gaining a terrible stepbrother.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$14,287,159 (16.6% of total gross)
Legs:6.01 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:34.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$90,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,653 opening theaters/3,705 max. theaters, 5.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $120,757,776

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 18th, 2015 (Wide) by 20th Century Fox
International Releases: December 23rd, 2015 (Wide) (Italy)
December 24th, 2015 (Wide) (Kenya)
December 24th, 2015 (Wide) (Brazil)
December 24th, 2015 (Wide) (Malaysia)
December 24th, 2015 (Wide) (Serbia and Montenegro)
Video Release: March 4th, 2016 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG or some mild rude humor and language.
(Rating bulletin 2399 (Cert #49907), 11/11/2015)
Running Time: 86 minutes
Franchise: Alvin and the Chipmunks
Cast, crew, or production detail: Animal Lead
Geographical setting: Florida, Miami

Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Animation/Live Action
Creative Type:Kids Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Fox 2000 Pictures, Bagdasarian Company, Regency Enterprises
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Through a series of misunderstandings, Alvin, Simon and Theodore come to believe that Dave is going to propose to his new girlfriend in New York City…and dump them. They have three days to get to him and stop the proposal, saving themselves not only from losing Dave but possibly from gaining a terrible stepbrother.
